headline: Insights
subheadline: Thoughts on trust architecture, AI governance, and building AI systems that actually work for people.

posts.title: Why Trust Architecture is the Future of Enterprise AI
posts.excerpt: As AI systems become more capable, the question isn't just 'can it do the task?' but 'can we trust it to do the task correctly?' We explore why trust architecture matters.

posts.title: Multi-Agent Verification: How Multiple AI Systems Keep Each Other Honest
posts.excerpt: One AI can hallucinate. Multiple AIs checking each other's work? That's a different story. Learn how multi-agent verification creates accountability.

posts.title: From Pilot to Production: The Progressive Autonomy Model
posts.excerpt: Start with close supervision, expand as trust is earned. We explain AEGIS's approach to gradually increasing AI independence.

posts.title: Grant Funding + AI: How Non-Profits Can Track Real Impact
posts.excerpt: Grant funders want to see results, not just promises. Here's how AEGIS helps 501(c)(3) organizations prove their AI programs deliver.

posts.title: The Case Against Black-Box AI in Business
posts.excerpt: If you can't explain what your AI is doing, you can't trust it. We make the case for transparent, auditable AI systems.

posts.title: Sandbox Isolation: Why Your AI Needs a Safe Testing Ground
posts.excerpt: Before an AI touches your real systems, it should prove itself in isolation. Learn about our sandbox-first approach to deployment.

newsletter.headline: Stay updated
newsletter.subheadline: Get our latest insights on trust architecture and AI governance delivered to your inbox.
